description: A lush area filled with trees and wildlife.
A shallow, sun-drenched shelf where hexagonal crystal coral refracts rainbow light.
Vast caverns lined with slow-burning, coal-blue 'cold-fire' lichen; oxygen-poor air forces copper-based life.
Temperate forest locked in perpetual dusk; water beads on high fronds and drips in musical pulses.
Endless salt flats crusted with micron-thin mirrored tiles; footsteps create illusory sky-ripples.
High-latitude plain with slightly weaker gravity; snow boulders float on wind currents.
Recently cooled lava fields where black glass fissures exhale chilled argon; neon bacteria bloom at night.
Grassland split by hairline fissures filled with clear silicate gel that pipes sunlight underground.
Coastal swamp where trees inhale methane at dusk and exhale CO₂ at dawn, shifting water levels.
Polar sea ice grown in magnetite-hex cells that levitate under solar wind; sailors skate-sail floes.
Vertical rainforest inside a continent-sized hollow trunk; waterfalls flow upward via capillary xylem.
